scene-1.setting: The deck of the Abraham Lincoln, stormy midnight
scene-1.synopsis: The Professor is thrown into the churning waves by a massive impact.

scene-2.setting: Surface of the dark ocean, waves crashing
scene-2.synopsis: The Professor struggles to stay afloat as the ship disappears into the fog.

scene-3.setting: Floating on the metallic surface of the Nautilus
scene-3.synopsis: The Professor finds a hard, steel island in the middle of the sea.

scene-4.setting: On top of the Nautilus, a hatch opens
scene-4.synopsis: A light shines from within the submarine as the hatch opens.

scene-5.setting: The grand salon of the Nautilus
scene-5.synopsis: Captain Nemo appears, standing among shelves of books and treasures.

scene-6.setting: The grand salon of the Nautilus
scene-6.synopsis: Nemo explains that they are now part of his undersea kingdom.

scene-7.setting: The ocean floor, a forest of giant red and white coral
scene-7.synopsis: The crew walks among the coral trees in diving suits.

scene-8.setting: Near a reef, schools of glowing fish pass by
scene-8.synopsis: Brightly colored fish weave through the coral branches.

scene-9.setting: A deep valley in the coral forest
scene-9.synopsis: The Professor examines a rare, glowing sea plant.

scene-10.setting: Inside the Nautilus, looking out the windows
scene-10.synopsis: A giant eye appears at the glass window.

scene-11.setting: The exterior of the Nautilus, tentacles wrapping around it
scene-11.synopsis: Enormous tentacles coil around the submarine's hull.

scene-12.setting: The bridge of the Nautilus, red lights flashing
scene-12.synopsis: The crew prepares to defend the ship.

scene-13.setting: The deck of the Nautilus, combat with the squid
scene-13.synopsis: The battle reaches its peak as the squid retreats.

scene-14.synopsis: The steel shutters open to reveal a glowing underwater vista.

scene-15.synopsis: Nemo shows the Professor his collection of marine knowledge.

scene-16.setting: The engine room, glowing with electric power
scene-16.synopsis: The Professor marvels at the advanced technology of the engines.

scene-17.setting: The hull of the Nautilus being checked by light
scene-17.synopsis: The crew inspects the minor damage after the squid attack.

scene-18.setting: Nemo's private cabin, filled with maps
scene-18.synopsis: Nemo gazes at a map of the ocean floor.

scene-19.setting: The grand salon, looking at the horizon
scene-19.synopsis: The Professor decides to continue the journey.

scene-20.setting: Inside the Nautilus, traveling through a deep trench
scene-20.synopsis: The submarine glides through a spectacular underwater canyon.

scene-21.setting: A vibrant reef full of life
scene-21.synopsis: The Professor takes notes on the marine life.

scene-22.setting: Near a foggy coastline at dawn
scene-22.synopsis: Nemo prepares a small boat for the Professor.

scene-23.setting: A rocky beach, the Nautilus submerged in the distance
scene-23.synopsis: The Professor watches the Nautilus disappear underwater.

scene-24.setting: A study with a window overlooking the sea
scene-24.synopsis: The Professor writes the book 'Twenty Thousand Leagues Under the Sea'.
